# API Reference

REST endpoints exposed by the Media Stack Controller, grouped by OpenAPI tag. Each page is rendered from the operation list in [`contracts/api/openapi.yaml`](../../../contracts/api/openapi.yaml).

> This page is regenerated by `bash bin/ops/generate-reference-docs.sh`. The contents below are seeded from the contract at the time of the Phase 15 commit; CI re-runs the generator on every build so the live site always matches `contracts/api/openapi.yaml`.
